project.description:
TicTac Client Release - Flutter Library Publisher

Runs tests, bumps version, and tags the tictac Flutter library with automatic semver.

Pipeline Steps:

  1. Version Bump - Reads the latest tag, bumps based on release type (patch/minor/major), creates and pushes new tag
  2. Resolve Dependencies - Runs flutter pub get
  3. Static Analysis - Runs flutter analyze
  4. Unit Tests - Runs flutter test (unit tests)
  5. Integration Tests - Runs integration tests against Tinode dev server
  6. Tag Release - Updates pubspec version and pushes tagged commit

Trigger:

Auto-triggers on merge to main (runs tests only). Manual trigger with release type to bump version and tag.

Links:

  • Repo: tictac

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: RELEASE_TYPE
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description:
patch (v1.2.3 -> v1.2.4)
Bug fixes, small tweaks. Backwards-compatible.

minor (v1.2.3 -> v1.3.0)
New features, new API methods. Backwards-compatible additions.

major (v1.2.3 -> v2.0.0)
Breaking changes. Existing consumers MUST update.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "==========================================" echo "TicTac Client Release Pipeline" echo "=========================================="
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/go/bin:$HOME/go/bin:$PATH"
# Set up git auth using GITHUB_TOKEN git remote set-url origin "https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Play-Bonkers/tictac.git"
# Fetch all tags from remote git fetch --tags --prune --prune-tags
# Find latest semver tag (vX.Y.Z) LATEST_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-v:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | head -1)
if [ -z "$LATEST_TAG" ]; then echo "No existing semver tags found, starting at v0.0.0" LATEST_TAG="v0.0.0" fi
echo "Latest tag: ${LATEST_TAG}" echo "Release type: ${RELEASE_TYPE}"
# Parse version components VERSION="${LATEST_TAG#v}" IFS='.' read -r MAJOR MINOR PATCH <<< "$VERSION"
# Bump based on release type case "${RELEASE_TYPE}" in major) MAJOR=$((MAJOR + 1)) MINOR=0 PATCH=0 ;; minor) MINOR=$((MINOR + 1)) PATCH=0 ;; patch) PATCH=$((PATCH + 1)) ;; *) echo "ERROR: Invalid RELEASE_TYPE '${RELEASE_TYPE}'" exit 1 ;; esac
NEW_VERSION="${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}" TAG_NAME="v${NEW_VERSION}"
echo "==========================================" echo "Version bump: ${LATEST_TAG} -> ${TAG_NAME} (${RELEASE_TYPE})" echo "Build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}" echo "=========================================="
# On webhook trigger RELEASE_TYPE defaults to "patch" but we skip tagging # Set AUTO_BUILD flag if triggered by webhook (no user interaction) if [ -z "${BUILD_CAUSE}" ] || echo "${BUILD_CAUSE}" | grep -qi "github"; then AUTO_BUILD=true else AUTO_BUILD=false fi
echo "TAG_NAME=${TAG_NAME}" > env.properties echo "VERSION=${NEW_VERSION}" >> env.properties echo "AUTO_BUILD=${AUTO_BUILD}" >> env.properties

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Resolve Dependencies" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
flutter pub get
echo "Dependencies resolved"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Static Analysis" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos lib/
echo "Static analysis passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Unit Tests" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
flutter test test/tinode_test.dart test/models/access-mode_test.dart test/services/cache-manager_test.dart test/services/auth_test.dart
echo "Unit tests passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Integration Tests (Tinode Dev Server)" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
flutter test test/integration/tictac_integration_test.dart --timeout 120s
echo "Integration tests passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Smoke Tests (Tinode Dev Server)" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
flutter test test/smoke/tinode_smoke_test.dart --timeout 60s || echo "Smoke tests completed (some may be expected failures)"
echo "Smoke tests done"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Tag Release: ${TAG_NAME}" echo "=========================================="
if [ "${AUTO_BUILD}" = "true" ]; then echo "Auto-build (webhook trigger) -- skipping version bump and tag." echo "To release, trigger manually with a RELEASE_TYPE." exit 0 fi
cd $WORKSPACE
# Update version in pubspec.yaml sed -i "" "s/^version: .*/version: ${VERSION}/" pubspec.yaml echo "Updated pubspec.yaml version to ${VERSION}"
# Commit version bump git add pubspec.yaml git config user.name "Jenkins CI" git config user.email "jenkins@playbonkers.com" git commit -m "Release ${TAG_NAME}" || echo "No changes to commit" git push origin HEAD:main
# Create and push the tag git tag -a "${TAG_NAME}" -m "Release ${TAG_NAME}" git push origin "${TAG_NAME}"
echo "==========================================" echo "Released successfully!" echo "Repo: https://github.com/Play-Bonkers/tictac" echo "Tag: ${TAG_NAME}" echo "=========================================="

jenkins.plugins.slack.SlackNotifier.customMessageUnstable: *TicTac Client Release* *Release:* ${RELEASE_TYPE} -> ${TAG_NAME} *Build:* <${BUILD_URL}|#${BUILD_NUMBER}> :warning: *Console:* <${BUILD_URL}console|View Logs> *Status:* Unstable (some tests failed)
